label: Breach the Sealed Library
note: Dragon's Lair entrance (docs/RAIL-COMMAND.md §Each map's FOUR sub-tracks): the deepest and hardest lair — the great-elder dragon has taken the castle's throne wing. The sealed library is its first hall, where the archivist wraith keeps the royal stacks. Breaching it relocates the princess into the wing's first room. The most expensive lair (roses logarithmic shortcut, gems exponential fallback).
